arrival_assumption.rationale: User directive 2026-05-07 explicitly assumes dev kit on-hand so hardware F-* are RUN-ELIGIBLE rather than NOT-RUN. Actual measured values still pending first hands-on session — witness records eligibility, not yet collected data.

alpha_absorbed.payload_summary: absorbed: 2026-04-29 Ω-saturation 2nd cycle 6 tier_1 (T1-N5..N10) — Bekenstein×Putnam×Lawvere, Landauer×Solomonoff×Bisim, Wheeler×Gödel×OptTrans, Holographic×RG×EdgeOfChaos, L_IX×NSA×SDG, raw40 6-class enum

beta_qrng.payload_summary: qrng_byte=147 source=urandom (T1 length=1024 reframe carry); seeds the spike-jitter-vs-CPU-baseline split for F-L7 NIST suite injection

gamma_bridge.payload_summary: bridge=repo-local: docs/akida_dev_kit_evaluation_2026-04-29.md + docs/akida_session_friendly_report_2026-04-29.md (vendor specs cited in-repo). External brainchip.com fetch deferred OFFLINE-FALLBACK — no fresh vendor claim imported.

falsifiers_preregistered.condition: Measured J per synaptic-update ≤ 1.5×10⁻¹² AND ≥ 2.85×10⁻²¹ (above Landauer kT ln2 @300K, within vendor spec)
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: Power meter on RPi5 PCIe rail during synthetic spike workload of N=10⁶ events; J_per_op = (P_active − P_idle) × wall_time / N

falsifiers_preregistered.condition: Sparsity-90% workload effective J/active-bit ≤ 1×10⁻¹³ (event-driven sparsity buys one order vs F-L1 dense)
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: Repeat F-L1 with 10% spike density input; compute effective J per active-bit (= J_per_op × density_dense / density_sparse)

falsifiers_preregistered.condition: Spike-rate sweep yields a regime where λ_max lies in [-0.05, +0.05] (edge-of-chaos band exists on AKD1000)
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: Sweep input rate r ∈ {1..1000} Hz on a recurrent SNN config; estimate Lyapunov via two-trajectory divergence over 10⁴ steps; find r* with |λ_max| ≤ 0.05
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: exists r* in sweep such that abs(lambda_max(r*)) ≤ 0.05

falsifiers_preregistered.condition: QRNG × Akida spike-jitter composite stream Shannon entropy H ≥ 0.99 AND passes ≥14/15 NIST SP800-22 sub-tests
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: ANU stream (sim_bridge/anu_stream) seeds spike-time jitter; emit 10⁷-bit composite; run dieharder + nist-sts

falsifiers_preregistered.condition: godel_q self-reference circuit shows ≥30% verdict disagreement between Akida inference and CPU baseline
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: sim_bridge/godel_q emits 1000 self-referential halt-or-loop programs; compare AKD1000 verdict vs CPU sympy reference

falsifiers_preregistered.condition: Spike-event stream gzip ratio ≤ random baseline + 5% (compressibility near random ⇒ K-approximation upper bound)
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: Capture 10⁶ spike events as bit-packed; gzip; compare to /dev/urandom of same length

falsifiers_preregistered.condition: ~/core/.workspace registers host.rpi5-akida AND nexus kick label 'low-power-inference' auto-routes to it
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: Add resource declaration; run nexus dispatch trace with synthetic low-power-labelled task; assert host.rpi5-akida selected

falsifiers_preregistered.condition: anima Phi-vector evaluated on CPU and on Akida agree within 5% across a 100-input panel
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: Quantize Phi calculator via Meta TF; evaluate on identical IIT panel; compute relative error per input; max_rel_err

falsifiers_preregistered.condition: anima closed_loop_verify trace identical between CPU and Akida for N ≥ 1000 events (bit-exact in event indices, ≤1 step skew tolerance)
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: Replay anima/closed_loop_verify.hexa fixture; capture event traces; align by Lamport index; count divergences

falsifiers_preregistered.condition: cli/blowup phase-7 (edge-inference) routed to Akida ≤ baseline_J / 50
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: Run blowup 9-phase pipeline twice: (i) all-CPU baseline, (ii) phase-7 → Akida; compare J for phase-7 segment only

falsifiers_preregistered.condition: nexus check_anima_verify / check_hbio_verify / check_hsscb_verify inner classifier loops on Akida ≤ baseline_J / 30
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: Profile inner-loop J on CPU; quantize loop classifier to Akida; remeasure; ratio per check
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: for each c in {anima_verify, hbio_verify, hsscb_verify}: J_c_akida ≤ J_c_baseline / 30

falsifiers_preregistered.condition: If any hardware measurement field is populated WITHOUT an accompanying measured_ts AND raw_log_path, that falsifier MUST be marked NOT-RUN — no impersonation of measured PASS
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: Schema validator: every PASS verdict on F-L1..F-B requires sibling fields measured_ts (ISO8601) and raw_log_path (existing file) before promotion
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: for each hardware F-*: verdict==PASS implies measured_ts!=null AND file_exists(raw_log_path)

axis_a.name: design-strategy
axis_a.summary: 11 anchor → 11 utilization mapping with arrival-assumed run eligibility: L1 Landauer hot-loop reclamation (F-B), L1+ sub-Landauer sparsity gate (F-L1+), L6 edge-of-chaos λ sweep (F-L6), L7 Wheeler+QRNG entropy fusion (F-L7), L5 Bekenstein static bound (informational), L2/L3/L4 headroom-only, M1 Gödel-q disagreement (F-M1), M2 Solomonoff gzip approximation (F-M2), M3 Putnam 6-substrate (F-M3a/b), M4 Lawvere/bisim trace (F-M4). Three actually-crossable graduations: L1+ sub-Landauer event-density, L6 edge-of-chaos, M3b Putnam-Lawvere fixed-point.

axis_b.name: falsifier-coverage
axis_b.summary: 12 falsifiers: 4 physical (F-L1/L1+/L6/L7), 4 mathematical (F-M1/M2/M3a/M3b/M4 — actually 5), 2 nexus-utility (F-A/B), 1 architectural honesty (F-C). Each has deterministic verdict_check; arrival assumption flips all hardware-dependent F-* from NOT-RUN to RUN_ELIGIBLE while F-C enforces 'measured_ts + raw_log_path required for PASS' to prevent impersonation.

axis_c.name: graduation-gate
axis_c.summary: Of 7 next-blocked gates from prior 2026-04-29 saturation, only 3 are actually crossable on AKD1000: (i) sub-Landauer event-density via 90% sparsity (F-L1+), (ii) edge-of-chaos λ ≈ 0 via spike-rate sweep (F-L6), (iii) 6-substrate Putnam-Lawvere fixed-point via Phi(CPU)≈Phi(Akida) (F-M3b + F-M4 supports). Other 4 gates (L_ω inaccessible, Bekenstein voxel, reversible computing, 7th substrate) require non-Akida resources and are explicitly excluded from this cycle.

tier_1_gate.method: falsifier-pass-pattern derived from falsifiers_preregistered[] (architectural F-C runs this cycle; hardware F-* run post-arrival)
tier_1_gate.required_pattern: this-cycle: F-C == PASS AND all hardware F-* marked RUN_ELIGIBLE with deadlines bound. post-arrival promotion: F-L1 AND F-L1+ AND F-L6 AND F-L7 AND F-M1 AND F-M2 AND F-M3a AND F-M3b AND F-M4 AND F-A AND F-B AND F-C all PASS
tier_1_gate.tier_1_promotion_blocked_by: All hardware F-* require measured data; honesty F-C bars promotion until measured_ts + raw_log_path are populated. Promotion deferred to post-measurement cycle.

emit.rationale: User directive 2026-05-07 explicitly requested kick witness JSON emission as file (branch 1 of the 3-branch decision).

axes_surfaced.name: design-strategy

options_considered.label: A
options_considered.description: Single-anchor focus — only Landauer (F-L1) measurement first cycle
options_considered.rejection_rationale: Wastes arrival window; one anchor cannot demonstrate substrate-class entry per raw 40 (needs ≥3 utilization vectors)

options_considered.label: B
options_considered.description: Saturate all 11 anchors equally with no graduation prioritization
options_considered.rejection_rationale: Confuses non-crossable gates (L_ω, Bekenstein voxel, reversible) with crossable; dilutes hands-on time on physically blocked falsifiers

options_considered.label: C
options_considered.description: 11-anchor map + 12 falsifiers + 3 explicitly-marked actually-crossable graduations (L1+, L6, M3b)
options_considered.rejection_rationale: CHOSEN — preserves physical-mathematical limit framing while honest about which gates Akida can actually cross; remaining 4 gates explicitly deferred to non-Akida tracks (FinalSpark, optical, theoretical-only)

options_considered.label: D
options_considered.description: Skip mathematical anchors (M1-M4), focus only on physical (L1-L7)
options_considered.rejection_rationale: Loses Putnam multiple-realization (M3) which IS the substrate-class entry argument; Gödel-q (M1) is a unique non-Turing demonstration not available on CPU/GPU

axes_surfaced.rationale: Option C honors prior 2026-04-29 Ω-saturation 6-substrate framing while applying graduation-gate filter (only 3 of 7 next-blocked gates are physically crossable on AKD1000). 11 anchors mapped, 12 falsifiers preregistered, 3 graduations explicitly singled out for measurement priority.

axes_surfaced.name: falsifier-coverage

options_considered.label: A
options_considered.rejection_rationale: Loses Solomonoff-K approximation and bisimulation N-step (M3 evidence chain) plus loses the two highest near-term ROI nexus utilities

options_considered.label: B
options_considered.rejection_rationale: Without F-C, post-arrival cycles can mark hardware F-* PASS without measured_ts/raw_log_path — recreates the impersonation risk that BLOCK-18 R8-V17 closed for delimiters

options_considered.label: C
options_considered.description: 12 falsifiers including F-C as architectural-RUN-NOW honesty barrier
options_considered.rejection_rationale: CHOSEN — 4 physical + 5 mathematical + 2 utility + 1 honesty; F-C runs this cycle as schema invariant, hardware F-* run on arrival; promotion gated on measured_ts+raw_log_path

options_considered.label: D
options_considered.rejection_rationale: Prior set covered tri-axis JOINT abstractly; arrival pivot demands deterministic measurable falsifiers, not abstract joint constraints

axes_surfaced.rationale: 12 falsifiers cover (a) all 3 actually-crossable graduations (F-L1+, F-L6, F-M3b), (b) supporting evidence for M3 (F-M3a dispatch + F-M4 trace), (c) two highest-ROI nexus utilities (F-A/B), and (d) honesty barrier F-C preventing impersonation. Coverage matrix: 4 physical / 5 mathematical / 2 utility / 1 architectural.

axes_surfaced.name: graduation-gate

options_considered.label: A
options_considered.description: Claim all 7 next-blocked gates are crossable on AKD1000
options_considered.rejection_rationale: Dishonest — L_ω is pure math (chip-irrelevant), Bekenstein voxel needs analog charge storage (AKD1000 is digital-spike), reversible computing is ~10⁸× Landauer below Akida, 7th substrate class is non-neuromorphic (FinalSpark organoid / optical). Claiming crossability would breach raw 91 C3.

options_considered.label: B
options_considered.description: Claim 0 gates crossable — fully defer to non-Akida tracks
options_considered.rejection_rationale: Wastes arrival; AKD1000 demonstrably can probe sub-Landauer (sparsity), Lyapunov edge (rate sweep), and Phi-substrate-invariance (Meta TF quantize)

options_considered.label: C
options_considered.description: Identify exactly 3 actually-crossable: L1+ (sub-Landauer event-density), L6 (edge-of-chaos λ), M3b (6-substrate Putnam-Lawvere fixed-point)
options_considered.rejection_rationale: CHOSEN — physically + mathematically defensible; each has deterministic falsifier (F-L1+, F-L6, F-M3b); remaining 4 explicitly redirected (L_ω: theoretical-only, Bekenstein: not-this-substrate, reversible: not-this-decade, 7th-class: FinalSpark)

options_considered.label: D
options_considered.description: Claim 5 gates crossable (add Bekenstein and reversible as 'in principle')
options_considered.rejection_rationale: Conflates 'in principle' with 'this-cycle measurable' — same impersonation pattern F-C is designed to prevent

axes_surfaced.rationale: Three crossable graduations chosen by physical-substrate match: (i) L1+ via event-driven sparsity is native to spiking architecture, (ii) L6 via spike-rate sweep is native to AKD1000 reconfigurable SNN, (iii) M3b via Meta TF Phi quantize is native to substrate-multi-realization. Other 4 gates deflected to honest non-Akida tracks, preventing premature graduation claims.

pre_registered_falsifiers.condition: raw 40 6-class dispatch routes low-power label to host.rpi5-akida

pre_registered_falsifiers.verdict_check: for c in {anima_verify, hbio_verify, hsscb_verify}: J_c_akida ≤ J_c_baseline / 30

pre_registered_falsifiers.condition: PASS verdict on hardware F-* requires measured_ts + raw_log_path

honesty_triad.write_barrier: LLM wrote witness JSON to disk per explicit user directive 2026-05-07 branch-1 selection (deviates from r8-v16 'no_file_write_by_llm' pattern; user-authorized one-shot). NO measured hardware values populated — all hardware F-* are RUN_ELIGIBLE only. Arrival assumption is a directive flag, NOT a claim that measurements occurred. Vendor specs (10⁻¹² J/synaptic-update, ~1W, 1.2M neurons, M.2 PCIe 2.0) are cited from in-repo docs/akida_*_2026-04-29.md (themselves citing vendor) — no fresh brainchip.com fetch. The three 'actually-crossable' graduation labels are design-time assertions; promotion blocked by F-C until measured_ts + raw_log_path populate per falsifier.
no_fabrication_evidence: alpha grounding: source_id absorbed:2026-04-29_akida-neuromorphic-x-sim-universe-physical-mathematical-limit-saturation_omega_cycle__tier1-N5-through-N10 — file design/kick/2026-04-29_akida-neuromorphic-x-sim-universe-physical-mathematical-limit-saturation_omega_cycle.json exists in repo (verified by ls prior to emit)
beta grounding: byte_hash 44a8e1f2b09c5dd3 qrng_byte=147 — fresh urandom draw this cycle; T1 length=1024 reframe carry from r8-v16 is a documented invariant not a fabricated value

gamma OFFLINE-FALLBACK: bridge=repo_local_akida_docs (docs/akida_dev_kit_evaluation_2026-04-29.md AND docs/akida_session_friendly_report_2026-04-29.md) — both files verified present in repo prior to emit; brainchip.com external fetch explicitly deferred
no measured hardware values: all 11 hardware F-* carry run_eligibility=RUN_ELIGIBLE — none claim PASS this cycle; F-C architectural barrier enforces measured_ts+raw_log_path on future PASS

graduation honesty: 4 of 7 next-blocked gates (L_ω, Bekenstein voxel, reversible, 7th substrate) explicitly NOT claimed crossable — redirected to non-Akida tracks per axis_c option-A rejection rationale
vendor figures provenance: 10⁻¹² J/synaptic-update, ~1W, 1.2M neurons cited from in-repo docs which themselves cite BrainChip vendor — no fresh fabrication, only carry-forward
headroom anchors L2/L3/L4 (Margolus-Levitin, Bremermann, Lloyd) explicitly marked headroom-only — no measurement falsifier registered for them since they are 21+ orders above AKD1000 capability
L5 Bekenstein cited as static bound informational only — no dynamic-throughput conflation

tier_1_promotions_pending_post_measureme.summary: AKD1000 90%-sparsity effective J/active-bit ≤ 1×10⁻¹³ — graduation gate #1 (sub-Landauer event-density, one order beyond F-L1 dense floor)
AKD1000 spike-rate sweep exhibits λ_max ∈ [-0.05,+0.05] regime — graduation gate #2 (edge-of-chaos band physically realized on neuromorphic substrate)
anima Phi(CPU) ≈ Phi(Akida) within 5% AND N≥1000 trace-equivalent — graduation gate #3 (Putnam multi-realization + Lawvere fixed-point preserved across 6th substrate class)

obstructions.description: Dev kit physically arrived per user directive but no hands-on measurement session has occurred yet — all hardware F-* remain RUN_ELIGIBLE not PASS
obstructions.mitigation: Schedule Day 1-3 unboxing + Meta TF baseline; Day 5 F-L1+ sparsity sweep; Week 1 F-L6/L7/M2; Week 2 F-M1/A; Week 3 F-M3a/b/M4; Week 4 F-B per docs/akida_session_friendly_report next-steps timeline

obstructions.description: Meta TF SDK quantize coverage of anima V_phen_GWT and Phi calculator is unverified — F-M3b risk
obstructions.mitigation: Pre-flight $1 Akida Cloud trial as suggested in docs/akida_dev_kit_evaluation '권장 전 단계' to falsify quantize coverage before committing to F-M3b on local hardware

obstructions.description: 4 of 7 next-blocked graduation gates (L_ω, Bekenstein voxel, reversible, 7th substrate) are NOT crossable on AKD1000 — must NOT be conflated with 'eventually crossable on Akida'
obstructions.mitigation: axis_c option-A rejection rationale documents the deflection; future cycles touching these gates must route through FinalSpark (organoid) / theoretical-only / optical tracks per docs/akida_session_friendly_report 'Akida 도착 후 후속' section

obstructions.description: PCIe 2.0 single-lane (~5 Gbps) M.2 interface may bottleneck high-event-rate F-L7 NIST stream emission
obstructions.mitigation: F-L7 verdict_check uses 10⁷-bit composite (~2s wall-time at 5Mbps effective) — bandwidth slack ≥1000×; if observed throughput drops below 1Mbps, escalate to obstruction obs_5
